steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The first sentence establishes a goal: the Cambridge students wanted their female actor friends to have good parts to play. The second sentence describes what they created: Six, a show where each of the six queens has a starring role. The transition must connect this goal to its fulfillment.

steps.title: Match the transition to the choices
steps.content: ”To that end,” works because it means “to accomplish that goal” or “with that goal in mind”—it directly shows that creating Six was the purposeful action taken to realize the goal. The other three don't capture this goal-to-action relationship. That matches choice A — A is correct.
